title: Gang War
writer: James Ashmore Creelman, Fred Myton, Edgar Allan Woolf
actors: Olive Borden, Jack Pickford, Eddie Gribbon
plot: A saxophone player Clyde, who busks on the San Francisco Bay waterfront. One night, he meets Flowers, and teaches her to dance, but finds that "Blackjack", the leader of a ruthless gang, is also in love with her.
